ops.text:
PHASE B DONE @ ec9f1025 (pushed main; CI queued behind a GitHub Actions infra incident 2026-07-19 — runs stuck `queued` + repeated API 503s; verified LOCALLY to Phase A's CI-proven bar: go build/vet/test -race, golangci uncapped 0, 33 goldens, capt-hook pack 29/29, plus a real daemon smoke round-trip creating ~/.cc-codex-ask state + OK reply). Background watch br6lvcq47 will report the CI verdict on recovery.

consumer.go (new) = the cc-interact consumer: daemon.New(Config{AppName:"codex-ask", Paths{App:".cc-codex-ask"}, Version:appVersion, ActiveStatuses:["open"], presence trio, AgentGreeting}), Migrate/AgentGate nil, no HTTP bridge; subcommands daemon/agent-start/inject/stop/report/channel/direct additive beside the flag dispatch (isConsumerSubcommand map, no shadowing). capt-hook/hooks/agent_plane.py+common.py (byte-match of cc-interact plugin-template, retargeted to codex-ask bin), scripts/mcp-channel.sh, plugin.json mcpServers/channels. Depends cc-interact@v0.12.0 + daemonkit pinned pseudo-version (both PUBLIC — no GOPRIVATE/token, resolves in CI). Wiring is a capt-hook PACK not hooks.json (plan was stale; corrected).

Refuter caught 1 real defect, FIXED inline: channelInstructions() dropped channel.RelayStep — the parent-side rule to SendMessage-wake an owner stranded 'done' with a pending directive. Without it the relay fallback (Phase C) is dead: a >4min dispatch outlives a parked owner → owner stops done → worker directs it → parent gets an unexplained agent.relay tag → result stranded. Fix: append channel.RelayStep(binaryName). Dropping ReceiveProtocol was correct (watch/ack codex lacks).

NEW deferred items found in B:
- Phase F: goreleaser ldflags must stamp `-X main.appVersion={{.Version}}` — consumer.go var appVersion="0.0.0"; A2's goreleaser dropped the -X ldflags, so every release reports 0.0.0 → daemon-upgrade matching never fires (stale daemon persists across builds). Fix in the Phase F goreleaser + add the var.
- Phase F/hygiene: add `capt-hook pack test` to codex-ci.yml (gates agent_plane.py + dispatch.py; not currently CI-gated).
- Phase C: awaitTimeout=4min (consumer.go:45) — for long xhigh dispatches the owner's await times out and must re-park; evaluate a longer window w/ progress pings + document the re-park loop + relay fallback in SKILL.md.
